name: "Infernoble Arms - Joyeuse"
name_jp: 『<ruby lang="jp"><rb>焔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ジョワユーズ』
desc: While this card is equipped to a monster: You can target 1 FIRE Warrior monster in your GY; add it to your hand, then destroy this card. If this card is sent to the GY because the equipped monster is sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 FIRE Warrior monster from your hand. You can only use 1 ""Infernoble Arms - Joyeuse"" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: While this card is equipped to a monster: You can target 1 FIRE Warrior monster in your GY; add it to your hand, then destroy this card. If this card is sent to the GY because the equipped monster is sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 FIRE Warrior monster from your hand. You can only use 1 ""Infernoble Arms - Joyeuse"" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
